ddls:
CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date of implementation */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date of expiration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_countries" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "implementation_status" TEXT /* Implementation status of the policy in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id", "country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_efficiency" (
  "energy_efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy efficiency measure */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy */,
  "energy_efficiency_measure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy efficiency measure */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the energy efficiency measure */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "baseline_year" INTEGER /* Baseline year for the energy efficiency measure */,
  "target_year" INTEGER /* Target year for the energy efficiency measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_efficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_efficiency_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_efficiency_energy_efficiency_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_efficiency_measure_id") REFERENCES energy_efficiency_measures ("energy_efficiency_measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_efficiency_measures" (
  "energy_efficiency_measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy efficiency measure */,
  "energy_efficiency_measure" TEXT /* Name of the energy efficiency measure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy efficiency measure */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the energy efficiency measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_efficiency_measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "renewables" (
  "renewable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each renewable energy source */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy */,
  "renewable_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the renewable energy source */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the renewable energy source */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "baseline_year" INTEGER /* Baseline year for the renewable energy source */,
  "target_year" INTEGER /* Target year for the renewable energy source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renewable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_renewables_renewable_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("renewable_source_id") REFERENCES renewable_sources ("renewable_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_renewables_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "renewable_sources" (
  "renewable_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each renewable energy source */,
  "renewable_source" TEXT /* Name of the renewable energy source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the renewable energy source */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the renewable energy source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renewable_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "low_carbon" (
  "low_carbon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each low-carbon technology */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy */,
  "low_carbon_technology_id" INTEGER /* ID of the low-carbon technology */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the low-carbon technology */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "baseline_year" INTEGER /* Baseline year for the low-carbon technology */,
  "target_year" INTEGER /* Target year for the low-carbon technology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("low_carbon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_low_carbon_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_low_carbon_low_carbon_technology_id FOREIGN KEY ("low_carbon_technology_id") REFERENCES low_carbon_technologies ("low_carbon_technology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "low_carbon_technologies" (
  "low_carbon_technology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each low-carbon technology */,
  "low_carbon_technology" TEXT /* Name of the low-carbon technology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the low-carbon technology */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the low-carbon technology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("low_carbon_technology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "non_energy" (
  "non_energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each non-energy metric */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy */,
  "non_energy_metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the non-energy metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the non-energy metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "baseline_year" INTEGER /* Baseline year for the non-energy metric */,
  "target_year" INTEGER /* Target year for the non-energy metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("non_energy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_non_energy_non_energy_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("non_energy_metric_id") REFERENCES non_energy_metrics ("non_energy_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_non_energy_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "non_energy_metrics" (
  "non_energy_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each non-energy metric */,
  "non_energy_metric" TEXT /* Name of the non-energy metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the non-energy metric */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the non-energy metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("non_energy_metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_activity" (
  "policy_activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy activity */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of policy activity */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the policy activity */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "baseline_year" INTEGER /* Baseline year for the policy activity */,
  "target_year" INTEGER /* Target year for the policy activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_activity_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)
